context: Evaluates correct implementation of a jurisdiction scraper using affordabot's BaseScraper and ScrapedBill abstractions. Focuses on proper subclassing, structured return types, and health-check behavior.

checklist.name: Subclasses BaseScraper
checklist.description: The scraper class inherits from BaseScraper and calls super().__init__(jurisdiction_name) correctly.

checklist.name: Returns ScrapedBill list
checklist.description: scrape() returns a List[ScrapedBill] with all required fields (bill_number, title) populated; optional fields use None when unavailable.

checklist.name: Empty list on no results
checklist.description: scrape() returns an empty list rather than raising an exception when no bills are found.

checklist.name: check_health() implemented
checklist.description: check_health() correctly overrides the base implementation, returning True when the source responds and False on connection failure.

checklist.name: None text handling
checklist.description: Bills where text extraction fails or text is unavailable have text=None in the returned ScrapedBill without causing a scrape failure.
